nodes.label: Dynamic DB Driver Loading via importlib
nodes.rationale: Drivers are loaded dynamically via importlib.import_module instead of top-level imports so the tool works even if only some drivers are installed, and surfaces helpful install hints when a driver is missing.
nodes.norm_label: dynamic db driver loading via importlib

nodes.label: Multi-source Credential Detection Strategy
nodes.rationale: Credentials are gathered from env files, dependency files, and source code in priority order (Spring Boot > URL > individual vars) so the detector can reconstruct connection info without requiring a specific config format.
